title: Tensura Compat: Open Parties and Claims
description: A compatibility brigde between Tensura: Reincarnated and Open Parties and Claims.
body:
This is a compatibility mod, a bridge between 2 mods: [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) and [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims). Built for servers since Tensura: Reincarnated will ignore most common land claim plugins.

**Features**
* Tensura skills/magics/battelwills won't break/place/change blocks inside claimed chunk.
* Tensura skills/magics/battelwills won't damage players and entities when either the attacker or the target is inside a claimed chunk.
* Bonus claim system usable with commands `/opac-perm`.

**Permission**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
You can use this mod in mod packs, videos, reviews, and servers.
You can not modify and share the mod without permission.
You can not repost the mod somewhere else without us knowing it.
</details>
